testcase.name: test_disabled_mobile_recharge_blocks_request
testcase.failure: tests/test_service_toggles.py:154: in test_disabled_mobile_recharge_blocks_request assert request_response.status_code == 503, f"Expected 503, got {request_response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 503, got 520 E assert 520 == 503 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_service_toggles.py:192: in test_disabled_dish_recharge_blocks_request assert request_response.status_code == 503, f"Expected 503, got {request_response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 503, got 520 E assert 520 == 503 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
